exercises.title: Inspect Block Devices
exercises.description: List disks and partitions, then identify the filesystem and mount point for your main volume.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can explain which block device backs your root filesystem.

exercises.title: Observe Disk Activity
exercises.description: Watch live I/O metrics while a copy runs and identify the busy device.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can read util%, await, and throughput while I/O is active.

exercises.title: Buffered vs Direct Write
exercises.description: Write a file with and without cache bypass and compare observed behavior.
exercises.command: dd if=/dev/zero of=test.bin bs=1M count=512 conv=fdatasync
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see the effect of forcing data to storage at the end of the write.

exercises.title: fio Read/Write Test
exercises.description: Run fio with sequential and random profiles on a test file and compare IOPS and latency.
exercises.expected_outcome: Random 4K reads should show lower throughput and higher latency than sequential runs.

exercises.title: Toy Write-Ahead Log
exercises.description: Build a tiny append-only log with checkpoints and recovery after a simulated crash.
exercises.expected_outcome: After restart, the program should replay the log and recover committed state.

exercises.title: Cache Effects on File Reads
exercises.description: Measure repeated file reads before and after dropping caches, then compare timings.
exercises.expected_outcome: The first read should be slower than the cached read after data is hot again.
